column573: Source: Department of Public Health and Medical Services, County Government of Homa Bay Total NB: The low underweight and stunting rates from the routine data does not reflect the true picture of the nutrition situation in the county. This is because not all children under the age of five years attend growth monitoring services on a monthly basis. The bulk of this population i.e. 10 months to 59 months hardly come for the services after receiving the first dose of measles vaccine. The cur- rent rate of stunting is 12.5% as per the KDHS 2022 while underweight stands at 6.1%. The population based data give a true reflection of the county situation.
